entry.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting] - Multiple Clusters Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 10, 07:00 - 15:00 UTC

May 22, 19:16 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 10/06/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During the operation, a few seconds of downtime may occur on the outbound connection.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing a network update, bringing improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster121 - Filerz10002 incident notification
entry.content:
May 29, 09:48 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering on Cluster121 - Filerz10002 has been resolved.

Start time : 29/05/2026 09:18 UTC
End time : 29/05/2026 09:24 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 29, 09:33 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary latency issue in the Cluster121 - Filerz10002.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 29/05/2026 09:18 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz10002 is temporarily facing latency on Web Hosting Cluster121.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily facing slowness when trying to access and use their websites located In Cluster121 - Filerz10002.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Domains] - Domains Name incident notification on .MG
entry.content:
May 29, 08:11 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our .MG Domain offering has been resolved.

Start time : 19/05/2026 14:30 UTC
End time : 29/05/2026 08:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 19, 14:52 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our .MG Domains offer, customers in the impacted zone are unable to perform some tasks on .MG domains.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/05/2026 14:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .MG domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform specified operations on .MG domains.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster 121 Filerz10002 Incident notification
entry.content:
May 28, 15:01 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on our Web Hosting offering in GRA which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/05/2026 13:40 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 14:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Filerz10002 experienced significant latency, resulting in degraded performance.
Customers Impact : Customers experienced slower response times and service instability.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Google Tools Incident Notification
entry.content:
May 27, 14:41 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting Google tools for our Web Hosting offer on the specific GRA region has been resolved.

Start time : 21/05/2026 12:00 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 12:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 26, 13:42 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting Google tools for our Web Hosting offer on the specific GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/05/2026 12:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some request from Google tools are reject when connecting with our GRA clusters.
Customers Impact : Customers may have issues with their Google tools to join their website.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 26, 13:22 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Web Hosting offer in GRA for the Google tools.

Start time : 21/05/2026 12:00 UTC

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Internet Access] - SDSL/ADSL/FTTH incident notification
entry.content:
May 20, 16:22 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 20/05/2026 15:15 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/05/2026 14:38 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : SDSL, ADSL and FTTH were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to connect to the internet via SDSL, ADSL and FTTH.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by another incident: https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/v8v5rcph9qt3

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][OverTheBox] -Network Perturbations incident notification
entry.content:
May 20, 16:20 UTC

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/05/2026 14:38 UTC

Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily facing issues to connect and use OverTheBox.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by another incident: https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/v8v5rcph9qt3

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan /Email Pro /Hosted Exchange /Private Exchange incident notification
entry.content:
May 25, 08:40 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : At this time, we are still awaiting a fix from Microsoft. The issue remains under review on their side, and we are actively following up to obtain further updates.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and the provider is mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 20, 09:05 UTC
Identified - We are waiting for Microsoft Security fix for our Exchange Collaborative solutions MX Plan, Email Pro, Hosted and private to fix some side effects related to mitigation

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/05/2026 08:42 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some MX Plan, Email Pro, Hosted Exchange and Private Exchange operations is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers may have the following issues :
OWA Print Calendar functionality might not work
OWA light mode does not work properly
Signature or images not displayed properly
Preview of attachments not working properly
Public calendar URLs generating error 500 in browser.
Ongoing Actions : We are waiting for Microsoft Security fix for our Exchange Collaborative solutions MX Plan, Email Pro, Hosted and private to fix some side effects related to mitigation.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Web Hosting] - Internal DNS Database Service Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
May 19, 14:26 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 18, 08:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 20, 13:01 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Database offer.

Start time : 18/05/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will upgrade the internal DNS supporting our database services.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web-Databases] - Databases sharedsql incident notification
entry.content:
May 16, 07:39 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web-Databases offering has been resolved.

Start time : 16/05/2026 05:17 UTC
End time : 16/05/2026 07:20 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 16, 06:00 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident affecting our Web Databases offering. We have identified the origin of the issue affecting the sharedsql instances listed below :
- sharedsql045.eu001
- sharedsql007.eu007
- sharedsql052.eu007
- sharedsql054.eu007
- sharedsql026.eu004
- sharedsql008.eu011


Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 16/05/2026 05:17 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The sharedsql databases listed above are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their databases hosted on the specified sharedsql instances.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA/BHS][Web Hosting] - Clusters maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 15, 20:05 UTC
Update - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 15, 20:05 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our Web Hosting is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

May 15, 12:38 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 15, 12:36 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer on the clusters.

Start time : 15/05/2026 11:50 UTC
End time : 18/05/2026 11:50 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, SSH and FTP services will be temporarily unavailable for a few minutes, and slower access to websites may be experienced.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing an update on our Web servers.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan incident notification
entry.content:
May 25, 09:03 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The incident is still under investigation.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams and our provider are currently investigating the incident to determine its origin and implement a fix.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 11, 14:56 UTC
Update - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering for MX Plan, which is causing temporary availability issue in the GLOBAL region to Microsoft domains (outlook.com, live.com and hotmail.com) and Cloudflare domains.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 07/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : MX Plan delivery outgoing mails to Microsoft domains (outlook.com, live.com and hotmail.com) and Cloudflare domains is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers using MX Plan are temporarily unable to send mails to Microsoft accounts (Outlook, Live, Hotmail) and Cloudflare accounts.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 11, 14:51 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Collaborative solutions offer.

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
